# Jacob Buys Your House
> Local cash home buyer in Wichita, Kansas

Jacob Matlock is a real estate investor based in Wichita, KS who buys houses for cash in any condition. He serves Wichita and all surrounding Sedgwick County communities including Derby, Mulvane, Haysville, Andover, Augusta, El Dorado, Park City, Bel Aire, Valley Center, Goddard, and Maize.

## What Jacob Does
- Buys houses for cash in Wichita KS and surrounding areas
- Closes in as little as 7 days
- Buys in any condition — no repairs required
- Charges no fees, no commissions, no closing costs
- Makes cash offers within 24 hours

## Contact
- Phone: (316) 816-2983
- Website: https://jacobbuysyourhouse.com
- Also operates as: Pillar Home Buyers (pillarhomebuyers.com)

## Situations Handled
Inherited property, foreclosure, divorce, as-is sales, rental property, tax liens, relocation, vacant houses, probate, bad condition homes

## Service Area
Wichita KS, Derby KS, Mulvane KS, Haysville KS, Andover KS, Augusta KS, El Dorado KS, Park City KS, Bel Aire KS, Valley Center KS, Goddard KS, Maize KS
